component.name: Automa
Automa
component.summary: Control panel for LNXlink MQTT agent
Painel de controle para o agente MQTT LNXlink

description.p: Automa is a GTK4/libadwaita graphical control panel for LNXlink, the MQTT agent that integrates your Linux desktop with Home Assistant. No terminal needed — configure everything from a clean GNOME interface.
Automa é um painel de controle GTK4/libadwaita para o LNXlink, o agente MQTT que integra seu desktop Linux ao Home Assistant. Sem terminal — configure tudo pela interface gráfica do GNOME.

ul.li: Start, stop and restart the LNXlink service
Enable or disable individual sensors (CPU, memory, camera, and more)
Create custom commands triggerable from Home Assistant automations
Set the device name shown in Home Assistant
Follows GNOME accent color and dark/light theme automatically

screenshot.caption: Dashboard showing LNXlink service status and controls
Sensor management — enable or disable individual modules
